scope_summary.problem: 6 separate cclab-grid-* crates create unnecessary inter-crate dependency complexity. Cross-crate imports (cclab_grid_core::, cclab_grid_formula::, etc.) add boilerplate and prevent sharing private types between modules.
scope_summary.success_criteria: Single cclab-grid crate compiles successfully. All internal imports converted to crate:: paths. cclab-grid-wasm builds against cclab-grid. Server binary preserved. All existing tests pass.

boundary.in_scope: Merge core, formula, history, db, server into cclab-grid modules. Update workspace Cargo.toml. Update wasm crate dependencies. Feature-gate server and db dependencies.
boundary.out_of_scope: cclab-grid-wasm stays separate (cdylib target). No functional changes to any module. No API changes visible to external consumers.
boundary.constraints: Must preserve cclab-wal dependency for db module. Must preserve cclab-kv dependency for server module. Server binary target must remain functional.
